title: athyrium decorum
intro: Athyrium decorum, also known as the Lady-in-Red fern, is a species of perennial fern native to China and Japan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Athyrium decorum include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and aid in the treatment of digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Athyrium decorum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, or combined with other herbs to create medicinal formulas.
